case_title: CACH, LLC VS. MICHAEL E LIPSON ET AL

docket_entries.description: MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 60905480) FILED BY DEFENDANT LIPSON, MICHAEL E

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO DEFENDANT MICHAEL LIPSON'S DEMURRER TO ALL THREE CAUSES OF ACTION IN THE COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ALL THREE CAUSES OF ACTION. NO OPPOSITION FILED. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jan-09-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

DEFENDANT MICHAEL LIPSON'S Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs is OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving party. Notice of Settlement on file.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D302)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-25-2017 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MICHAEL LIPSON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

Defendant Michael Lipson's demurrer to all three causes of action in the complaint is sustained without leave to amend as to all three causes of action. No opposition filed.

Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Gordon Aiavao, CSR #11216, gaiavao@sftc.org, Reported. =(302/HK)
